goal: Make capability truth updates flow from tracked evidence artifacts instead of ad hoc manual sync.
successCriteria: Capability scorecard and verification report consume the same evidence snapshot.
Promotion decisions can update maturity metadata through a deterministic tracked path.
Manual overrides remain explicit instead of masquerading as primary truth.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Full automatic scraping of the external docs site.
Changing product maturity levels without explicit promotion decisions.
